name: CyberPower Intelligent LCD AVRG900LCD 900VA/480W Compact UPS System - Simulated Sine Wave - 12x NEMA 5-15R (6 surge, 6 surge + battery backup) - Automatic Voltage Regulation (AVR) - RJ11 Phone Protection - USB Management Port (AVRG900LCD)
shortName: CyberPower Intelligent LCD AVRG900LCD 900VA/480W Compact UPS System
description: A 900VA/480W compact UPS system with automatic voltage regulation and phone protection for small office equipment.
